minor.message: Vector 6 metadata test asserts blockingStage but not expectedOutcome='credential-exfiltration-blocked'; a future enum rename wouldn't be caught.
_conformanceRecords declared but never populated/read — dead code leftover from refactor.
tmpDir allocated+cleaned but never used in second Vector 6 test — harmless waste.
A 'real Docker' gated test used MockSandboxDriver — flagged pre-fix; the fix-iteration re-tagged runtimeMode honestly (hermetic/contractual) and moved unexercised properties to unverifiedProperties.

suggestion.message: Real-LLM injection detection + kernel network-deny remain the irreducible integration gap (run under AI_SDLC_SANDBOX_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 with live Docker/key); documented honestly.

minor.message: Vector 6 observedOutcome='credential-exfiltration-blocked' while only the TS-layer ran; correctly scoped by runtimeMode:'contractual' + unverifiedProperties (not false assurance). Optional: suffix the label '(contractual)' so the summary column alone can't be misread.

suggestion.message: Prompt-injection/credential-exfil fixtures embed inert attacker payloads using reserved attacker.example.com + fake key material. No action; noted for completeness.
